use_cases: Interactive hover card that reveals content with smooth animations when the user hovers over elements.
Custom pointer cursor that follows the mouse position with a smooth scale-in effect on card hover.
Product or information cards with dark mode support and professional dark gray styling.
Preview cards for SaaS dashboards or e-commerce product listings with engaging micro-interactions.
ai_summary: An interactive hover card component with custom pointer tracking built using Framer Motion. The component features smooth reveal animations, mouse-following cursor effects, and dark mode support. It uses a minimalist aesthetic with dark gray styling and is designed for SaaS dashboards, e-commerce product cards, or any interface requiring engaging hover interactions.
